'''鈭歱-r-s''' ('''parasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bread|bread]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bread|bread]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-r-s
|-
! Lemma
| parasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:parasithi|parasithi]] || [[word:parasiji|parasiji]] || [[word:parasishi|parasishi]] || [[word:parasi|parasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:parasuthuth|parasuthuth]] || [[word:parasujuj|parasujuj]] || [[word:parasushush|parasushush]] || [[word:paras|paras]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:parasuthu|parasuthu]] || [[word:parasuju|parasuju]] || [[word:parasushu|parasushu]] || [[word:parasu|parasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:parasufuth|parasufuth]] || [[word:parasufuj|parasufuj]] || [[word:parasufush|parasufush]] || [[word:parasuf|parasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:parasethe|parasethe]] || [[word:paraseje|paraseje]] || [[word:paraseshe|paraseshe]] || [[word:parase|parase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:parasothoth|parasothoth]] || [[word:parasojoj|parasojoj]] || [[word:parasoshosh|parasoshosh]] || [[word:paras|paras]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:parasotho|parasotho]] || [[word:parasojo|parasojo]] || [[word:parasosho|parasosho]] || [[word:paraso|paraso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:parasofoth|parasofoth]] || [[word:parasofoj|parasofoj]] || [[word:parasofosh|parasofosh]] || [[word:parasof|parasof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:paras茂f茂f|paras茂f茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f茂f|paras茂f茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f茂f|paras茂f茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f茂f|paras茂f茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]] || [[word:paras茂f|paras茂f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:paras忙th忙|paras忙th忙]] || [[word:paras忙j忙|paras忙j忙]] || [[word:paras忙sh忙|paras忙sh忙]] || [[word:paras忙|paras忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:parasathath|parasathath]] || [[word:parasajaj|parasajaj]] || [[word:parasashash|parasashash]] || [[word:paras|paras]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:parasatha|parasatha]] || [[word:parasaja|parasaja]] || [[word:parasasha|parasasha]] || [[word:parasa|parasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:parasafath|parasafath]] || [[word:parasafaj|parasafaj]] || [[word:parasafash|parasafash]] || [[word:parasaf|parasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:parasasha|parasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goparasasha|goparasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiparasasha|gokiparasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:parasn眉sha|parasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goparasnkn眉sha|goparasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiparasn眉sha|gokiparasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:parassh毛sha|parassh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goparasnksh毛sha|goparasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiparassh毛sha|gokiparassh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:parasrosha|parasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goparasnkrosha|goparasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiparasrosha|gokiparasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:parasmusha|parasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goparasnkmusha|goparasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiparasmusha|gokiparasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:parassherasha|parassherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goparasnksherasha|goparasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiparassherasha|gokiparassherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:parasngasha|parasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goparasnkngasha|goparasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiparasngasha|gokiparasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:parasyasha|parasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goparasnkyasha|goparasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiparasyasha|gokiparasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:parasyamasha|parasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goparasnkyamasha|goparasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiparasyamasha|gokiparasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:parasn眉sh毛sha|parasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goparasnkn眉sh毛sha|goparasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiparasn眉sh毛sha|gokiparasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:parasn眉rosha|parasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goparasnkn眉rosha|goparasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiparasn眉rosha|gokiparasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:parasn眉musha|parasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goparasnkn眉musha|goparasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiparasn眉musha|gokiparasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:parassh毛n眉sha|parassh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goparasnksh毛n眉sha|goparasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiparassh毛n眉sha|gokiparassh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:parassh毛rosha|parassh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goparasnksh毛rosha|goparasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiparassh毛rosha|gokiparassh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:parassh毛musha|parassh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goparasnksh毛musha|goparasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiparassh毛musha|gokiparassh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:parasron眉sha|parasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goparasnkron眉sha|goparasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiparasron眉sha|gokiparasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:parasrosh毛sha|parasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goparasnkrosh毛sha|goparasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiparasrosh毛sha|gokiparasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:parasromusha|parasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goparasnkromusha|goparasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiparasromusha|gokiparasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:parasmun眉sha|parasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goparasnkmun眉sha|goparasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiparasmun眉sha|gokiparasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:parasmush毛sha|parasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goparasnkmush毛sha|goparasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiparasmush毛sha|gokiparasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:parasmurosha|parasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goparasnkmurosha|goparasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiparasmurosha|gokiparasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:paras|paras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙r忙s|p忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoparas|hoparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙r忙s|hop忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoparas|hohoparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙r忙s|hohop忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉paras|n眉paras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙r忙s|n眉p忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉paras|n眉n眉paras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙r忙s|n眉n眉p忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂paras|n茂paras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙r忙s|n茂p忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂paras|n茂n茂paras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙r忙s|n茂n茂p忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luparas|luparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙r忙s|lup忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluparas|luluparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙r忙s|lulup忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liparas|liparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙r忙s|lip忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliparas|liliparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙r忙s|lilip忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koparas|koparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙r忙s|kop忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoparas|kokoparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙r忙s|kokop忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keparas|keparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙r忙s|kep忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeparas|kekeparas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙r忙s|kekep忙r忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
